items.title: Release workflow parity + first tag publish proof
items.why: 001A and 001B complete: tag v0.3.0-alpha.1 with filled evidence in docs/releases/PR-PLAT-NP-001-release-parity-evidence.md.

items.title: Real Conexus package-mode compatibility
items.why: Contract in docs/consumer-blueprints/CONEXUS_ONTOGONY_PACKAGE_MODE_CONTRACT.md; Conexus CI conexus-ontogony-package-mode + MSBuild guard; green job URL in contract and Conexus BUILD_VALIDATION.md.

items.title: Supply-chain workflow first-run evidence
items.why: Partially complete: CodeQL, supply chain (incl. SBOM), and dependency-review wiring are documented green in docs/security/PLAT-NP-003-supply-chain-first-run-evidence.md. Dependency submission remains blocked until GitHub Dependency graph is enabled for the repository (Settings → Code security and analysis), not by workflow code; capture first green submission run and close.

items.title: Donor and incoming-package hygiene
items.why: validate-nupkg-coordination-path-hygiene.ps1 in CI/release after pack; docs/packages/index.md documents planning vs shipped paths.

items.title: README/docs accuracy pass
items.why: Baseline accuracy pass merged (23-package catalog, release lines, consumer docs). Docs remain continuous maintenance when packages or baselines change.

items.title: Deferred-item register
items.why: DEFERRED_ITEMS.md plus PLAT_ROBUSTNESS_SEQUENCE.md links give explicit rationale and revival criteria for PR-PLAT-003 and PR-PLAT-012.

items.title: Secret resolver reference parser
items.why: SecretValueReferenceParser.TryParse in Ontogony.Secrets (scheme:locator, first colon); tests and public API snapshots updated; no cloud SDKs.

items.title: In-memory warning coverage expansion
items.why: Ongoing: audit new in-memory DI registrations; baseline warning tests exist for artifact store, execution journal, quota ledger, and in-memory outbox (see PR-PLAT-NP-008 spec inventory).

items.title: Public API review gate hardening
items.why: Checklist for intentional public API snapshot updates: changelog + migration note when applicable; see pr-specs/PR-PLAT-NP-009-public-api-change-checklist.md.
